test.create_query: CREATE TABLE vector_similarity_src ( id UInt64, vec Array(Float32) ) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO vector_similarity_src SELECT number, arrayMap(i -> toFloat32(sin(number * 0.017 + i * 0.31) + cos(number * 0.005 + i * 0.13)), range(16)) FROM numbers(100000)
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE vector_similarity_src_128 ( id UInt64, vec Array(Float32) ) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO vector_similarity_src_128 SELECT number, arrayMap(i -> toFloat32(sin(number * 0.013 + i * 0.19) + cos(number * 0.007 + i * 0.11)), range(128)) FROM numbers(50000)
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE vector_similarity_src_hash64 ( id UInt64, vec Array(Float32) ) ENGINE = Memory
test.fill_query: INSERT INTO vector_similarity_src_hash64 SELECT number, arrayMap(i -> toFloat32((reinterpretAsUInt64(sipHash64(number, i)) % 10000) / 5000.0 - 1.0), range(64)) FROM numbers(20000)
test.create_query: CREATE TABLE vector_similarity_hnsw ( id UInt64, vec Array(Float32), INDEX idx vec TYPE vector_similarity('hnsw', 'L2Distance', 16) GRANULARITY 100000000 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192

CREATE TABLE vector_similarity_ivf ( id UInt64, vec Array(Float32), INDEX idx vec TYPE vector_similarity('ivf', 'L2Distance', 16, 'i8', 64, 8) GRANULARITY 100000000 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192

CREATE TABLE vector_similarity_hnsw_cosine ( id UInt64, vec Array(Float32), INDEX idx vec TYPE vector_similarity('hnsw', 'cosineDistance', 16) GRANULARITY 100000000 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192

CREATE TABLE vector_similarity_ivf_cosine ( id UInt64, vec Array(Float32), INDEX idx vec TYPE vector_similarity('ivf', 'cosineDistance', 16, 'i8', 64, 8) GRANULARITY 100000000 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192

CREATE TABLE vector_similarity_hnsw_128 ( id UInt64, vec Array(Float32), INDEX idx vec TYPE vector_similarity('hnsw', 'L2Distance', 128) GRANULARITY 100000000 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192

CREATE TABLE vector_similarity_ivf_128 ( id UInt64, vec Array(Float32), INDEX idx vec TYPE vector_similarity('ivf', 'L2Distance', 128, 'i8', 128, 16) GRANULARITY 100000000 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192

CREATE TABLE vector_similarity_hnsw_hash64 ( id UInt64, vec Array(Float32), INDEX idx vec TYPE vector_similarity('hnsw', 'L2Distance', 64) GRANULARITY 100000000 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192

CREATE TABLE vector_similarity_ivf_hash64 ( id UInt64, vec Array(Float32), INDEX idx vec TYPE vector_similarity('ivf', 'L2Distance', 64, 'i8', 128, 32) GRANULARITY 100000000 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192

CREATE TABLE vector_similarity_hnsw_merge ( id UInt64, vec Array(Float32), INDEX idx vec TYPE vector_similarity('hnsw', 'L2Distance', 16) GRANULARITY 100000000 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192

CREATE TABLE vector_similarity_ivf_merge ( id UInt64, vec Array(Float32), INDEX idx vec TYPE vector_similarity('ivf', 'L2Distance', 16, 'i8', 64, 8) GRANULARITY 100000000 ) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY id SETTINGS index_granularity = 8192
test.query: INSERT INTO vector_similarity_hnsw SELECT * FROM vector_similarity_src
INSERT INTO vector_similarity_ivf SELECT * FROM vector_similarity_src
INSERT INTO vector_similarity_hnsw_cosine SELECT * FROM vector_similarity_src
INSERT INTO vector_similarity_ivf_cosine SELECT * FROM vector_similarity_src
INSERT INTO vector_similarity_hnsw_128 SELECT * FROM vector_similarity_src_128
INSERT INTO vector_similarity_ivf_128 SELECT * FROM vector_similarity_src_128
INSERT INTO vector_similarity_hnsw_hash64 SELECT * FROM vector_similarity_src_hash64
INSERT INTO vector_similarity_ivf_hash64 SELECT * FROM vector_similarity_src_hash64

WITH arrayMap(i -> toFloat32(sin(12345 * 0.017 + i * 0.31) + cos(12345 * 0.005 + i * 0.13)), range(16)) AS reference_vec SELECT id FROM vector_similarity_hnsw ORDER BY L2Distance(vec, reference_vec) LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null

WITH arrayMap(i -> toFloat32(sin(12345 * 0.017 + i * 0.31) + cos(12345 * 0.005 + i * 0.13)), range(16)) AS reference_vec SELECT id FROM vector_similarity_ivf ORDER BY L2Distance(vec, reference_vec) LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null

WITH arrayMap(i -> toFloat32(sin(12345 * 0.017 + i * 0.31) + cos(12345 * 0.005 + i * 0.13)), range(16)) AS reference_vec, ( SELECT groupArray(id) FROM ( SELECT id FROM vector_similarity_ivf ORDER BY L2Distance(vec, reference_vec) LIMIT 10 SETTINGS ignore_data_skipping_indices = 'idx' ) ) AS exact_ids, ( SELECT groupArray(id) FROM ( SELECT id FROM vector_similarity_ivf ORDER BY L2Distance(vec, reference_vec) LIMIT 10 ) ) AS approx_ids SELECT throwIf(length(arrayIntersect(exact_ids, approx_ids)) < 8) FORMAT Null

SELECT throwIf( (SELECT sum(data_compressed_bytes) FROM system.data_skipping_indices WHERE table = 'vector_similarity_ivf') >= (SELECT sum(data_compressed_bytes) FROM system.data_skipping_indices WHERE table = 'vector_similarity_hnsw')) FORMAT Null

WITH arrayMap(i -> toFloat32(sin(12345 * 0.017 + i * 0.31) + cos(12345 * 0.005 + i * 0.13)), range(16)) AS reference_vec SELECT id FROM vector_similarity_hnsw_cosine ORDER BY cosineDistance(vec, reference_vec) LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null

WITH arrayMap(i -> toFloat32(sin(12345 * 0.017 + i * 0.31) + cos(12345 * 0.005 + i * 0.13)), range(16)) AS reference_vec SELECT id FROM vector_similarity_ivf_cosine ORDER BY cosineDistance(vec, reference_vec) LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null

WITH arrayMap(i -> toFloat32(sin(12345 * 0.013 + i * 0.19) + cos(12345 * 0.007 + i * 0.11)), range(128)) AS reference_vec SELECT id FROM vector_similarity_hnsw_128 ORDER BY L2Distance(vec, reference_vec) LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null

WITH arrayMap(i -> toFloat32(sin(12345 * 0.013 + i * 0.19) + cos(12345 * 0.007 + i * 0.11)), range(128)) AS reference_vec SELECT id FROM vector_similarity_ivf_128 ORDER BY L2Distance(vec, reference_vec) LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null

WITH arrayMap(i -> toFloat32((reinterpretAsUInt64(sipHash64(20001, i)) % 10000) / 5000.0 - 1.0), range(64)) AS reference_vec SELECT id FROM vector_similarity_hnsw_hash64 ORDER BY L2Distance(vec, reference_vec) LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null

WITH arrayMap(i -> toFloat32((reinterpretAsUInt64(sipHash64(20001, i)) % 10000) / 5000.0 - 1.0), range(64)) AS reference_vec SELECT id FROM vector_similarity_ivf_hash64 ORDER BY L2Distance(vec, reference_vec) LIMIT 10 FORMAT Null
INSERT INTO vector_similarity_hnsw_merge SELECT * FROM vector_similarity_src WHERE id < 50000
INSERT INTO vector_similarity_hnsw_merge SELECT * FROM vector_similarity_src WHERE id >= 50000
OPTIMIZE TABLE vector_similarity_hnsw_merge FINAL
INSERT INTO vector_similarity_ivf_merge SELECT * FROM vector_similarity_src WHERE id < 50000
INSERT INTO vector_similarity_ivf_merge SELECT * FROM vector_similarity_src WHERE id >= 50000
OPTIMIZE TABLE vector_similarity_ivf_merge FINAL
